purpose: Demote finite summation-by-parts, Lean formalization, and formal-verification arXiv metadata into source leads only after adding a finite paired-stencil Lean replay rung.

classifications.reason: LLM-driven formalization and verification-aware language lead.
Compositional formal verification in Dafny; adjacent proof-method lead.
Formal verification defenses; adjacent proof-systems lead.
Refinement types and formal verification lead.
Lean Copilot; agent-assisted theorem proving lead.
Lean formalization of De Giorgi-Nash-Moser theory; source-body review required before citation use.
Lean 4 theorem proving for deterministic guardrails; applied proof-system lead.

boundaries: This gate classifies arXiv metadata only.
It does not establish paper truth, source-body review, latest literature coverage, or exhaustive literature coverage.
It does not promote any PDE result, theorem-prover result beyond the local Lean file, or grand-problem claim.
No row is used as proof of the cyclic summation-by-parts theorem; the Lean replay receipt is the proof artifact for that bounded theorem.
